---
applyTo: ".specify/**,specs/**,prompts/**,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,.github/**/*.md"
---

# Campfire Spec-Kit And AI Assets

- Treat Spec-Kit artifacts as the source of truth for feature intent when present.
- Keep prompts, specs, plans, and task files concise and traceable.
- Prefer linking to focused artifacts over duplicating long instructions.
- Do not add heavyweight agent context files unless they reduce repeated exploration.
